title: Freezer_Server
description: This mod has the function of freezing when no one is on the server and unfreezing when someone joins the server.
body:
This mod has the function of freezing when no one is on the server and unfreezing when someone joins the server. The commands for this mod consist of the game’s own command /tick.

It is server-side only and does not require a client.

I make to work on neoforge ver.21.1.197 on Minecraft ver.1.21.1 / I don’t know about the other versions.

Gona make some more version and test it out in future.

 

Someone needs to enter the server and then leave for it to start working. Our execute the command /tick freeze on server terminal.
